creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
# portupgrade gegl 

brings this



GEGL_SWAP=RAM GEGL_PATH=../operations \
./tools/introspect > class-hierarchy.html
mkdir -p images
./tools/gobj2dot.rb .. | /usr/local/bin/dot -Tpng > images/inheritance.png
